title: oreoselis cervaria
intro: Oreoselis cervaria, also known as American burnett or American unicorn root, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its distinctive white or purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin infections. The health benefits of Oreoselis cervaria include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from pain and itching. Oreoselis cervaria can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
